text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day at summer camp, during our
post-training free time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Air Groove looking concerned over in the
break area. On the table in front of her are some
pens and a notepad.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good timing. I want your opinion on something.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Look at this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pick up the notebook that Air Groove had been
staring at. It looks like she's been working on a
training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's quite intense in volume and difficulty, but a
lot of it seems surprisingly basic by Air Groove's
standards.
choice_data_list: Did you make this for yourself?
Did you make this for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, this is for the Umamusume joining summer
camp for the first time next year.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I designed it for students who don't have a trainer
of their own, or who wish to supplement their
assigned training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I thought it might be useful to have such a
template available, so that the younger
Umamusume know how best to utilize their time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To think that Air Groove has been considering
the needs of future camp participants, even when
she has her own training for the Shuka Sho to
attend to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Touched by the depth of her concern for others, I
decide to help her out.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's already this late...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we realize it, it's already time for lights
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the past few hours, we've turned the one
regimen into many, each targeting a certain area
to work on.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, not too shabby. Not that I would expect any
less from my trainer, mind you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. You should get to bed promptly
tonight. We have an early start tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, after the end of the group
training session...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to test out the training regimens we
wrote up yesterday. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What are you so surprised about? Do you really
expect me to recommend a training regimen I
haven't trialed myself?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We have a responsibility as the creators to make
sure these regimens are perfect. I am shocked
that this even needs explanation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous. What exactly is it that you
take me for? This benefits you as well, you know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This is the perfect opportunity to do some
focused training in preparation for the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove flashes a disarming smile that leaves
no room for argument.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Right. I'll have you pick. Which of the regimens
from yesterday would you like to practice?
choice_data_list: The "Forged in the Fires of Hell" regimen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the regimen that focuses on essential strength
training, reinforcing muscles throughout the
body.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we'll need to test this one carefully to ensure
it's properly balanced. Very well, let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm itching to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the setting sun on our backs, Air Groove
and I test run the new training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Phew! Yes, this regimen is great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clearly a tough workout, but Air Groove
manages it without so much as a complaint. I
wouldn't expect any less of her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She's always giving it her all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's why she's capable of aiming for the Triple
Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I think I know what I need to do!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not bad—but I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Air Groove continues her diligent training, a
small crowd of younger Umamusume gather to
watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's evident that each and every one of them are
in awe of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove eventually finishes up the training
regimen without a single misstep.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A full-out shuttle run on the beach that feels like
a sprint to hell and back... Yes, the simplicity of
this one is precisely what makes it the biggest
trial of willpower.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little surprised you chose this one. Still, it'll
make for good training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right. I expect you to help make this even
tougher for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If my pace drops—even by a little—before I reach
the target number of laps, you need to get me
back on track.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Keep an eye on my energy and push me right to
my limits. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just so we're clear, I intend to go faster than
whatever you're imagining. Treat this like a
life-or-death contest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We begin the "Forged in the Fires of Hell"
regimen, and Air Groove's pace eventually begins
to drop as she racks up repetitions.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!
choice_data_list: That was a tenth of a second slower!
That was a tenth of a second slower!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Not if I can help it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gives a smirk and ups her pace. I'm
left in awe at her guts and unwillingness to quit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She's always seeking to reach greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's why she's capable of aiming for the Triple
Tiara so confidently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I think I know what I need to do!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...
choice_data_list: Come on! Is that the best you've got?!
Come on! Is that the best you've got?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Air Groove pushes herself to her limits, a small
crowd of younger Umamusume gather to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's evident that each and every one of them are
in awe of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the enraptured crowd looks on, Air Groove
spectacularly achieves her rep target.
